problem id: 7af6e047
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  01110010 -> 01001110
  01100010 -> 01001100
  10110011 -> 01110110
  10110010 -> 01010110
  10010101 -> 10110010
  10101111 -> 11110101
  00101001 -> 00100101
  10000100 -> 10010000
  11011100 -> 10011011
  00010100 -> 10000010

query: 01110110
predicted answer: 11001110
